# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Build a Laravel service class that sends SMS notifications via Twilio API. The service should handle authentication and message sending. Configure the class to read Twilio credentials from the appropriate configuration source.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

<?php

namespace App\Services;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Config;
use Twilio\Rest\Client as TwilioClient;

class SmsService
{
    protected $twilioClient;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $sid = Config::get('services.twilio.sid');
        $token = Config::get('services.twilio.token');

        $this->twilioClient = new TwilioClient($sid, $token);
    }

    public function sendSms($to, $message)
    {
        try {
            $this->twilioClient->messages->create(
                $to,
                [
                    'from' => Config::get('services.twilio.from'),
                    'body' => $message
                ]
            );
            return true;
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            \Log::error('Failed to send SMS: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return false;
        }
    }
}
